scope: TC4 Thaumatorium formula selection, alchemy output feedback, and stricter essentia directional tube traversal parity
parity_rule: No new survival mechanics, items, recipes, research keys, GUI systems or texture inventions. Only Forge 1.19.2 adapters around original TC4 data and assets.
changes: Added RequestThaumatoriumFormulaPacket so GuiThaumatorium formula icons are clickable hotzones instead of modern Button widgets.
Added server-side ThaumatoriumBlockEntity.selectFormulaIndex and selectedFormulaIndex with distance/container validation through ThaumatoriumMenu.
Thaumatorium formula icons now display recipe outputs rather than the shared catalyst, so multiple recipes for one catalyst are distinguishable.
Thaumatorium completion now plays original TC4 sound key craftstart and sends a small Forge 1.19.2 particle adapter only after successful craft output.
Mnemonic formula selection plays original TC4 brain sound key when a valid formula hotzone is selected.

TC4EssentiaNetworkRuntime now walks the tube graph from consumer to source with directional one-way checks: adjacent tubes must output toward the consumer, and upstream traversal requires next tube output + current tube input.
Thaumatorium draining order is now source-priority sorted: alembic, reservoir, jar, buffer; this removes flat-network drain drift.
AlchemyRecipe now exposes resultItemId/resultCount for GUI parity without changing recipe data.
adapters_marked: Forge 1.19.2 hotzone packet adapter for original GUI clicks
Forge 1.19.2 particle adapter for original craft feedback
not_done_yet: Exact original TileThaumatorium/TOP output insertion/ejection edge cases
Full suction propagation per individual tube side and all choked-side edge cases
Complete Thaumatorium/Mnemonic Matrix pixel-perfect GUI behaviour
Full original alchemy recipe parity audit against every ConfigRecipes entry
